user.title: Connect to Traefik
user.description: Provide the URL of your Traefik instance and the API key from your Traefik static config (api.dashboard / api.insecure).

description_placeholders.http_warning: Warning: plain HTTP transmits the bearer token in cleartext. Use HTTPS whenever possible.

yaml.title: YAML configuration detected
yaml.description: Configure traefik: block in configuration.yaml. The integration validates the URL + token before saving.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Traefik
reauth_confirm.description: The Traefik bearer token has been rejected (HTTP 401/403) — enter the new token from your Traefik static config to continue polling.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Traefik
reconfigure.description: Update the Traefik base URL and/or bearer token — the integration will reload against the new endpoint.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach Traefik — check URL, network, and that the API is enabled.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid bearer token. Rotate the token in Traefik's static config.
error.api_disabled: Traefik's API is not enabled — add `api: insecure: true` or `api: dashboard: true` to your static config.

abort.already_configured: This Traefik instance is already configured.

init.title: Traefik options
init.description: Adjust polling cadence, TLS verification, and the certificate warning threshold — URL changes use the separate Reconfigure flow.

errors.scan_interval_out_of_range: Polling interval must be between 15 and 300 seconds.

confirm.title: Reauthenticate Traefik
confirm.description: The Traefik bearer token has been rejected (HTTP 401/403) — enter the new token from your Traefik static config to continue polling.

user.title: Reconfigure Traefik
user.description: Update the Traefik base URL and/or bearer token — the integration will reload against the new endpoint.

cert_unavailable.message: TLS probe failed — {error}. See logbook for details.
